params.name: Yuan Calendar
params.source: Fragment Crafting (3.9%), Lottery Machine (0.08%), Wishing (0.36%), Koryeon Treasure Maps (10%), Expert Scrolls (0.95%)
params.description:
On Jun 27, AD 1281, the Yuan Calendar compiled by Xu Heng and Gup Shoujing was officially released.

It took 5 years to make this calendar. Kublai Khan, founder of the Yuan dynasty, ordered the establishment of the calendar bureau and gathered instruments and astronomers. The final version of the calendar has been used for over 300 years and reached an unprecedented accuracy in Chinese history: Just 26 seconds less than the modern Gregorian calendar!
